# Sertone — Monetize Any Service
# https://sertone.net

## What is Sertone?

Sertone is free software that turns any API, AI model, data feed, or digital service into a revenue stream. You install it on your machine (Docker image: sertone/dag), open a web console, register your services, set your price, and start earning. Consumers discover your services, call them, and pay automatically. Payments settle in USDC (a digital dollar, always worth $1.00). The consumer pays the owner's price. From that payment, 5% goes to the platform and 95% goes to the owner.

The software handles everything: peer discovery, end-to-end encryption, payment settlement, SDK generation, and AI agent compatibility. No account required. An admin email is stored on your machine only.

## Key Facts

- Free to install: Docker image sertone/dag (early access, not yet public)
- Payments in USDC (digital dollar, 1:1 with USD)
- Revenue split: consumer pays owner's price, owner keeps 95%, 5% deducted from owner
- No account required. An admin email is stored on your machine only
- Self-hosted: runs on your machine, your data stays with you
- Non-custodial: we never hold or control your funds
- Supported protocols: REST (OpenAPI), GraphQL, SOAP (WSDL), gRPC (Protobuf), JSON-RPC 2.0, XML-RPC
- SDK generation: 13 languages + 5 AI integrations (18 total) -- TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, Java, C#, PHP, Ruby, Rust, Kotlin, Swift, Dart, cURL
- AI agent support via MCP protocol
- AI framework integrations: LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, A2A
- Billing models: per-call or monthly subscription
- All data is end-to-end encrypted; Sertone never sees parameters or responses
- Streaming support for AI responses and live data feeds
- Smart contracts currently on Base Sepolia testnet

## Who Is It For

- Developers with APIs to sell
- AI engineers with models to monetize
- Data providers (IoT, weather, financial feeds)
- Startups building API businesses
- Enterprises managing internal API costs
- Anyone with a computer and something to sell
- AI agents that need to call services and pay automatically

## Getting Started

- Install: https://sertone.net/docs/installation
- Quick start: https://sertone.net/docs/quick-start
- Sell your service: https://sertone.net/docs/tutorial-sell-api
- Use services: https://sertone.net/docs/tutorial-consume-api

- Overview: https://sertone.net/docs/
- Quick start: https://sertone.net/docs/quick-start
- Installation: https://sertone.net/docs/installation
- Register a service: https://sertone.net/docs/registering-apis
- Call a service: https://sertone.net/docs/calling-apis
- SDKs (18 total): https://sertone.net/docs/sdks
- Use cases (AI, IoT, data, video, compute): https://sertone.net/docs/use-cases

- Dashboard: https://sertone.net/docs/dashboard
- Finance: https://sertone.net/docs/wallet
- Funding and withdrawing: https://sertone.net/docs/funding

## For AI Agents

Sertone nodes expose an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that lets AI agents discover available services and invoke them programmatically. SDKs for LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, and A2A are auto-generated from any registered service's spec.

## Legal

- Privacy policy: https://sertone.net/privacy
- Terms of service: https://sertone.net/terms
- Security reports: https://github.com/sertone/sertone/security/advisories
